diagrams.name: package_setup_and_configuration
diagrams.title: Package Setup & Configuration
diagrams.description: Developer registers and configures the AI package within a Laravel application, selecting providers and publishing config/migrations.

diagrams.name: text_generation
diagrams.title: Text Generation
diagrams.description: Developer generates text completions, streams responses, and receives structured or plain-text AI outputs via any supported provider.

diagrams.name: structured_output_generation
diagrams.title: Structured Output Generation
diagrams.description: Developer requests AI responses conforming to a defined JSON/object schema, using ObjectSchema and structured response types.

diagrams.name: agent_interactions
diagrams.title: Agent Interactions
diagrams.description: Developer defines and invokes AI agents with instructions, tools, and conversation history to orchestrate multi-step AI tasks.

diagrams.name: tool_use_and_function_calling
diagrams.title: Tool Use & Function Calling
diagrams.description: Developer equips agents with callable tools; the AI provider requests tool invocations, results are fed back into the conversation.

diagrams.name: streaming_responses
diagrams.title: Streaming Responses
diagrams.description: Developer consumes real-time streamed AI output, handling text chunks, tool-call deltas, and finish events via SSE/chunked responses.

diagrams.name: embeddings_and_similarity_search
diagrams.title: Embeddings & Similarity Search
diagrams.description: Developer generates vector embeddings from text and performs nearest-neighbour similarity searches against a vector store.

diagrams.name: image_generation
diagrams.title: Image Generation
diagrams.description: Developer generates images from text prompts using image-capable providers (OpenAI DALL·E, XAI, etc.).

diagrams.name: audio_generation_and_transcription
diagrams.title: Audio Generation & Transcription
diagrams.description: Developer converts text to speech (TTS) via ElevenLabs or transcribes audio files to text using transcription-capable providers.

diagrams.name: reranking
diagrams.title: Reranking
diagrams.description: Developer reranks a list of documents or passages relative to a query using dedicated reranking providers (Cohere, VoyageAI, Jina).

diagrams.name: file_and_vector_store_management
diagrams.title: File & Vector Store Management
diagrams.description: Developer uploads files to provider storage, manages vector stores, and retrieves or deletes stored resources.
diagrams.scope: Remote file and vector store CRUD

diagrams.name: conversation_memory_management
diagrams.title: Conversation Memory Management
diagrams.description: Developer persists and retrieves multi-turn conversation history across requests using conversation stores and the RememberConversation middleware.

diagrams.name: middleware_and_provider_options
diagrams.title: Middleware & Provider Options
diagrams.description: Developer customises the AI request pipeline using middleware and provider-specific options (temperature, max tokens, etc.).

diagrams.name: async_and_queued_operations
diagrams.title: Async & Queued Operations
diagrams.description: Developer dispatches agent prompts to Laravel queues for background processing, with broadcast notifications on completion.

diagrams.name: multi_provider_management
diagrams.title: Multi-Provider Management
diagrams.description: Developer selects, switches between, or composes multiple AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Groq, Mistral, Ollama, etc.) at runtime.

diagrams.name: testing_and_faking
diagrams.title: Testing & Faking
diagrams.description: Developer tests AI-integrated code using fake gateways, spy gateways, and test helpers that simulate provider responses without real API calls.
